__description: Example data for config/visors Firestore document. Replace example.visor@gmail.com with real emails and adjust storeIds to match actual store document IDs (or store names used as IDs) in the stores collection.
__howToImport: 2. Navigate to config/visors (create if missing: collection 'config' → document ID 'visors')
3. Paste the 'visors' array below into the document as a field named 'visors' (type: array)
5. Have the visor sign in with Google using their registered email
